name: capture_viewport
description: Capture the current UE5 editor viewport to a PNG. Combined with project-info and logs, this is the minimum visual confirmation that UE5 is live and Bionics can reach it. Works on any project — no assumptions about assets or maps.
prerequisites: UE5 Editor open with any project loaded
Web Remote Control + Python Editor Script Plugin enabled in UE5
OR BionicsBridge plugin installed for the native (5-20ms) path
